CustomField.description: DML Rows usage as percentage of transaction total. Shows warning (30%) and danger (50%) thresholds to identify resource-heavy work items.
CustomField.formula: IF( ISBLANK(LimitsDmlRowsConsumed__c) || ISBLANK(AuditTransaction__r.LimitsDmlRowsConsumed__c) || AuditTransaction__r.LimitsDmlRowsConsumed__c = 0, "N/A", IF(LimitsDmlRowsConsumed__c / AuditTransaction__r.LimitsDmlRowsConsumed__c >= $CustomMetadata.UoWLimitsThreshold__mdt.DmlRows.WorkItemRedPercent__c / 100, "⛔", IF(LimitsDmlRowsConsumed__c / AuditTransaction__r.LimitsDmlRowsConsumed__c >= $CustomMetadata.UoWLimitsThreshold__mdt.DmlRows.WorkItemAmberPercent__c / 100, "⚠️", "✅") ) & " " & TEXT(ROUND(LimitsDmlRowsConsumed__c / AuditTransaction__r.LimitsDmlRowsConsumed__c * 100, 1)) & "% of txn (" & TEXT(LimitsDmlRowsConsumed__c) & " / " & TEXT(AuditTransaction__r.LimitsDmlRowsConsumed__c) & ")" )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: DML Rows usage as percentage of transaction total. Shows warning (30%) and danger (50%) thresholds to identify resource-heavy work items.
CustomField.label: DML Rows
